paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces intra-layer model parallelism for training transformer language models up to **8.3 billion parameters** using **8-way model parallelism**, achieving **76% scalability efficiency** with **15.1 PetaFLOPs** on 512 GPUs while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on WikiText103, LAMBADA, and RACE datasets.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Aggregated dataset consisting of Wikipedia, CC-Stories, RealNews, OpenWebText, BooksCorpus (filtered)
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, text generation, article completion, question answering, natural language inference, downstream NLP tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-source code and evaluation pipelines provided at NVIDIA/Megatron-LM repository)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer language models to billions of parameters without custom compilers or frameworks, overcoming memory constraints through model parallelism.
raw_extraction.extension: Careful placement of layer normalization in BERT-like models improves accuracy scaling with model size.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: **Reconfigures layer normalization and residual connections** in BERT architectures to improve accuracy scaling with model size, enabling training of **3.9 billion parameter** BERT-like models while achieving state-of-the-art results on RACE (90.9% accuracy).
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Aggregated dataset consisting of Wikipedia, CC-Stories, RealNews, OpenWebText, BooksCorpus (filtered)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, reading comprehension, text classification, downstream NLP tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-source code and evaluation pipelines provided at NVIDIA/Megatron-LM repository)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Overcoming memory limitations to train large-scale BERT models efficiently using model parallelism.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked language modeling (MLM), Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
raw_extraction.extension: Intra-layer model parallelism implemented via targeted modifications to existing PyTorch transformer implementations without requiring custom C++ code or recompilation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalable model parallelism for training large GPT-2 models up to 8.3B parameters using 8-way model parallelism and 64-way data parallelism across 512 GPUs
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, text generation, zero-shot task transfer
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-sourced code but no explicit license mentioned for models)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient training of multi-billion parameter language models using model parallelism
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Up to 32 DGX-2H servers (512 Tesla V100 SXM3 32GB GPUs)
raw_extraction.extension: Activation checkpointing after every transformer layer to reduce memory footprint
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalable model parallelism for training large GPT-2 models up to 8.3B parameters using 8-way model parallelism and 64-way data parallelism across 512 GPUs
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, text generation, zero-shot task transfer
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-sourced code but no explicit license mentioned for models)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient training of multi-billion parameter language models using model parallelism
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Up to 32 DGX-2H servers (512 Tesla V100 SXM3 32GB GPUs)
raw_extraction.extension: Activation checkpointing after every transformer layer to reduce memory footprint
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalable model parallelism for training large GPT-2 models up to 8.3B parameters using 8-way model parallelism and 64-way data parallelism across 512 GPUs, achieving 74% weak scaling efficiency
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, text generation, zero-shot task transfer
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-sourced code but no explicit license mentioned for models)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient training of multi-billion parameter language models using model parallelism
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Up to 32 DGX-2H servers (512 Tesla V100 SXM3 32GB GPUs)
raw_extraction.extension: Activation checkpointing after every transformer layer to reduce memory footprint
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Reorganized layer normalization placement and residual connections to stabilize training of large BERT models, improving validation perplexity and downstream performance
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: English Wikipedia, BookCorpus (similar to original BERT)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, text classification, question answering, reading comprehension
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (open-sourced code but no explicit license mentioned for models)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling BERT-style models beyond BERT-Large without degradation
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Up to 32 DGX-2H servers (512 Tesla V100 SXM3 32GB GPUs)
raw_extraction.extension: Layer normalization rearrangement and residual connection modification to improve stability and scalability
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced **model parallelism** for training multi-billion-parameter language models, enabling distributed training across GPUs without increasing memory footprint per device.
raw_extraction.application: Large-scale language modeling, text generation, and natural language processing tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep learning models to billions of parameters while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.hardware_used: NVIDIA GPUs (multi-GPU clusters for model parallelism)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: **Strong scaling analysis** of model parallelism, demonstrating linear speedups with increased GPU count (e.g., 8.3B model trained with 512 GPUs). Introduced techniques like hybrid model/data parallelism and optimized all-reduce operations for gradient synchronization.
raw_extraction.application: Large-scale language modeling, text generation, and natural language processing tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep learning models to billions of parameters while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: Hybrid model-and-data-parallelism framework enables efficient training of models exceeding single-GPU memory limits.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: **Demonstrated training of the largest Transformer model at the time (8.3B parameters)** using model parallelism, achieving 512-GPU scaling with 8-way model parallelism and 64-way data parallelism. Presented empirical results on attention head scaling and strong scaling efficiency.
raw_extraction.application: Large-scale language modeling, text generation, and natural language processing tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep learning models to billions of parameters while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: Optimized all-reduce operations for gradient synchronization across model parallel groups, reducing communication overhead.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Model Parallelism** for training multi-billion parameter language models, enabling efficient scaling across multiple GPUs using tensor and pipeline parallelism.
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, text generation, long-term context reasoning (via sliding window attention)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient training of very large-scale language models (>1B parameters) using distributed model parallelism techniques.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **sliding window attention** and **overlap computation** to improve memory efficiency during training while maintaining performance on long-term context tasks like WikiText103 perplexity.
raw_extraction.application: Language modeling, long-term dependency tasks, text generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable training of large language models with optimized memory usage through model parallelism and attention mechanisms.
raw_extraction.extension: Sliding window attention with overlap computation reduces memory bandwidth bottlenecks during training.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Demonstrates **scalability to 4.2B parameters** using advanced model parallelism techniques, achieving state-of-the-art perplexity on WikiText103 (10.81).
raw_extraction.application: Advanced language modeling, long-form text generation, cloze-style reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Training extremely large language models (>4B parameters) efficiently with minimal loss in performance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism
